news.t: IBN Announces Latest Episode of The TechMediaWire Podcast featuring Etienne Moshevich, CEO of Planet Ventures Inc.
Upexi to Host Fiscal 2024 First Quarter Financial Results Conference Call on November 14th at 4:30 PM ET
US-Iran Tensions Fuel Energy ETF Breakout

holdings.infoBox: PXI is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Targa Resources stock at 7.11%, Marathon Petroleum at 5.96%, Permian Resources at 3.82%, Liberty Energy at 3.63%, and Viper Energy at 3.60%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Energy Momentum ETF (PXI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund tracks an index of US energy firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PXI was launched on Oct 12, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: US-Iran Tensions Fuel Energy ETF Breakout
data.text: Energy ETFs broke out from a short-term downtrend amid rising U.S.-Iran tension.
